title: Explain how automation impacts network management

questions.question: Which is a reason to automate a process for the configuration of several routers?
choices: To increase the possibility for misconfiguration
To create an outcome that can be reproduced
To decrease problems from the new configuration
To allow you to do less work

correct.explanation: The correct answer is "To create an outcome that can be reproduced".

incorrect.explanation: To increase the possibility for misconfiguration does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "To increase the possibility for misconfi…" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: To decrease problems from the new configuration does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "To decrease problems from the new config…" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: To allow you to do less work does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "To allow you to do less work" without matching the scenario constraint

answerReview.examTip: Separate management plane (API/controller) from data plane (forwarding).

questions.question: You need to configure a new static route on the existing 20 routers. Which is the best way to do this?
choices: Copy and paste scripts built in Notepad++ into each router.
Copy and paste scripts built in Excel into each router.
Create a Python script to configure each router.
Work with a partner so that both of you can double-check each other’s work and cut the time in half.

correct.explanation: The correct answer is "Create a Python script to configure each router.".

incorrect.explanation: Copy and paste scripts built in Notepad++ into each router. does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Copy and paste scripts built in Notepad+…" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: Copy and paste scripts built in Excel into each router. does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Copy and paste scripts built in Excel in…" without matching the scenario constraint

incorrect.explanation: Work with a partner so that both of you can double-check each other’s work and cut the time in half. does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Assuming both MAC addresses are learned into the CAM table

answerReview.examTip: Separate management plane (API/controller) from data plane (forwarding).

questions.question: Which is the number one motivating factor to use network automation?
choices: Reduce the number of changes to be made
Reduce the complications that arise from changes
Reduce the planning time for the changes

correct.explanation: The correct answer is "Reduce the human error factor".

incorrect.explanation: Reduce the number of changes to be made does not match the mechanism asked here.
incorrect.misconceptionTested: Selecting "Reduce the number of changes to be made" without matching the scenario constraint
